$room..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('players/X/uid').val() == auth.uid && !newData.child('players/O').exists()) || (data.exists() && (data.child('players/X/uid').val() == auth.uid || data.child('players/O/uid').val() == auth.uid || (!data.child('players/O').exists() && newData.child('players/O/uid').val() == auth.uid))))
$room..validate: $room.matches(/^[A-Z0-9]{6}$/) && newData.hasChildren(['board', 'turn', 'winner', 'players', 'createdAt']) && newData.child('turn').isString() && (newData.child('turn').val() == 'X' || newData.child('turn').val() == 'O') && newData.child('winner').isString() && (newData.child('winner').val() == '' || newData.child('winner').val() == 'X' || newData.child('winner').val() == 'O' || newData.child('winner').val() == 'draw')
